title: stenocactus obvallatus
intro: Stenocactus obvallatus, also known as the button cactus, is a species of cactus native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Stenocactus obvallatus include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant's herbal preparations typically involve making infusions or decoctions from its stems and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or used topically as ointments.
